webSearch.baseUrl.label: SearXNG Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Base URL of your SearXNG instance, such as http://localhost:8080 or https://search.example.com/searxng.

webSearch.categories.label: SearXNG Categories
webSearch.categories.help: Optional comma-separated categories such as general, news, or science.

webSearch.language.label: SearXNG Language
webSearch.language.help: Optional language code for results such as en, de, or fr.
